title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people sending a parcel. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A woman and her son are at a post office counter. The boy is holding a small parcel while the woman is speaking to a member of staff. There are envelopes, boxes and a notice board behind the counter.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people feeding ducks. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A grandfather and a little girl are feeding ducks beside a pond in a park. The girl is throwing small pieces of food into the water. There are ducks, trees, a bench and grass around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
